subcodes.first_line: O herald of Abdu'l-Baha! Letter number thirty-one was received and its contents became known. From the gathering of the friends on the eve of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بشیر عبدالبهاء نامه شماره ۳۱ رسید و مضمون معلوم گردید از اجتماع یاران در شب
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @martyrs and martyrdom
